allow: PowerShell(gh auth status)
PowerShell(winget --version)
PowerShell(winget install --id GitHub.cli --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements --silent)
PowerShell($env:Path += ';C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI'; gh auth status)
PowerShell($env:Path += ';C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI'; Write-Output "" | gh auth login --hostname github.com --git-protocol https --web)
PowerShell(Copy-Item "TEXMA.html" "index.html" -Force)
PowerShell(git init 2>$null)
PowerShell(git add index.html TEXMA.html manifest.json sw.js icon.svg LEEME.md)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:4173/TEXMA.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "status: $\($r.StatusCode\) len: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { "FALLO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { [xml]$x = Get-Content 'icon.svg' -Raw; "SVG valido. Elementos: rects=$\($x.svg.g.g[0].rect.Count\) path=$\(\($x.svg.path | Measure-Object\).Count\)" } catch { "SVG INVALIDO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell($env:Path += ';C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI'; git branch -M main; gh repo create texma --public --source . --remote origin --push)
PowerShell($env:Path += ';C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI'; gh api -X POST repos/sommimarket/texma/pages -f "source[branch]=main" -f "source[path]=/")

PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach\($i in 1..12\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://sommimarket.github.io/texma/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){ "LISTO en intento $i · status 200 · bytes: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 10 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ 'Aun no responde tras 2 min' })

PowerShell(foreach\($f in 'manifest.json','sw.js','icon.svg'\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sommimarket.github.io/texma/$f" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "$f -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes\)" } catch { "$f -> FALLO" } })
PowerShell(git add LEEME.md)
PowerShell(git push)
PowerShell($env:Path += ';C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI'; gh auth setup-git; git push)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img=[System.Windows.Forms.Clipboard]::GetImage\(\); if\($img\){ $img.Save\("$PWD\\logo-original.png",[System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); "GUARDADO: $\($img.Width\)x$\($img.Height\)" } else { "portapapeles sin imagen" })

PowerShell($chrome = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"\) | Where-Object {Test-Path $_} | Select-Object -First 1; if\($chrome\){ $chrome } else { 'chrome no encontrado'; \(Get-Command msedge -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source })
PowerShell(git add -A)
